note: KGP 2.3.20-2.3.21 fully supports Gradle 7.6.3-9.3.0 and AGP 8.2.2-9.0.0.
AGP 9.2 requires Gradle 9.4.1; AGP 9.1 requires Gradle 9.3.1; AGP 9.0 requires Gradle 9.1.0.
Kotlin 2.3 Android class files require AGP 8.13.2 and R8 8.13.19; 9.x versions before 9.0.28 do not support Kotlin 2.3.
Compose Multiplatform 1.11.0 is compatible with latest Kotlin, needs matching Compose Compiler Gradle plugin version, and requires at least Kotlin 2.1.0.
Gradle 9.5.1 requires JVM 17-26 to run; Gradle is tested with Kotlin 2.0.0 through 2.3.20.
